student_reviews.pros: Great access to top Investment Banks and Consulting firms, non disclosure grade policy, strong culture, student-led recruiting resources
student_reviews.cons: Limited opportunities in PE or VC without prior experience, student body diversity could be improved

student_reviews.pros: Amazing community support, great professors, excellent facilities, strong career opportunities in consulting/IB, case method learning
student_reviews.cons: High workload during core curriculum, location 2 hours from good airport, small city limitations

student_reviews.pros: Talented diverse student body, strong alumni network, great career support for consulting and IB, beautiful Charlottesville location
student_reviews.cons: Tech career support lacks behind peer schools, difficult to balance high academic pressure with other commitments

student_reviews.pros: Top-notch professors and classroom experience, focus on teamwork/integrity/leadership, dream city location, comparable recruiting to top schools
student_reviews.cons: Non-ideal location for some companies, career services department in flux
